name: Gold Tone Black Square Pendant Necklace
description: Make a bold yet minimalist statement with this gold-tone necklace. Featuring a striking black square pendant with softly rounded edges suspended on a delicate beaded satellite chain. Designed with an anti-tarnish finish for enduring, everyday elegance.

media.alt_text: Gold tone necklace featuring a black square pendant on a beaded satellite chain

faqs.question: Is the pendant heavy?
faqs.answer: No, the pendant is lightweight and designed for comfortable, all-day wear.

faqs.question: Can I wear this everyday without it tarnishing?
faqs.answer: Yes, this necklace features a durable anti-tarnish finish, making it highly resistant to fading and perfect for daily use.

meta_title: Gold Tone Black Square Pendant Necklace | Anti-Tarnish
meta_description: Discover the Gold Tone Black Square Pendant Necklace. A minimalist design featuring a striking black pendant on a beaded chain with an anti-tarnish finish.
